title: Warner Music Group signs new $1.645bn credit agreement with JPMorgan, refinancing existing debt
summary:
Agreement comprises a $1.295B term loan, the proceeds of which will be used to pay off WMG's existing term loan debt and related fees, and a $350M revolving credit facility
